summary: Fleet Portal Add Driver Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 API tests passed (9 existing + 3 new for POST /api/fleet/drivers). Frontend: All 9 test scenarios passed - Login, Drivers list with 'Ajouter un chauffeur' button, Add driver form with all fields, form validation, cancel/back navigation, and driver detail panel.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to Emergent preview system wrapper elements injecting <span> into <tbody>/<tr> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.fleet_login_success: PASS - POST /api/fleet/auth/login returns accessToken, refreshToken and company data
backend_tests.fleet_login_missing_fields: PASS - Returns 422 when required fields missing
backend_tests.fleet_drivers_list: PASS - GET /api/fleet/drivers returns array with driver data
backend_tests.fleet_vehicles_list: PASS - GET /api/fleet/vehicles returns array with vehicle data
backend_tests.add_driver_missing_fields: PASS - POST /api/fleet/drivers returns 422 for missing required fields (lastName, email, gender, password)
backend_tests.add_driver_validation: PASS - POST /api/fleet/drivers correctly proxies to C# API with payload validation

frontend_tests.fleet_login: PASS - Login with Nandetiri1@gmail.com/12345678 redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.add_driver_button: PASS - data-testid='add-driver-btn' shows 'Ajouter un chauffeur' text

add_driver_form_fields.phone: PASS - PhoneInput with country code selector (data-testid='phone-number-input')
add_driver_form_fields.gender: PASS - data-testid='driver-gender' select with Homme/Femme options

frontend_tests.form_validation: PASS - Submitting empty form shows toast 'Veuillez remplir tous les champs obligatoires'
frontend_tests.driver_detail_panel: PASS - Clicking 'Voir' button opens data-testid='driver-detail' panel

verified_features: Fleet Login: Email/password form with validation, redirects to dashboard on success
Drivers List Page: Shows existing drivers in table format with 'Ajouter un chauffeur' button
Add Driver Button: Green button with UserPlus icon navigates to /fleet/drivers/add
Add Driver Form: All required fields present (firstName, lastName, email, phone with country code, gender, password)
Phone Input: Custom component with country code selector (+33 France default) and phone number input
Password Field: With eye icon toggle for show/hide
Form Validation: Client-side validation shows error toast when required fields empty
Backend Proxy: POST /api/fleet/drivers proxies to POST https://api.zont.cab/api/Driver with auth
Driver Detail Panel: Still works on drivers list page
critical_code_review_comments: FleetAddDriver.js correctly implements form with all required fields from C# API spec
Phone number formatting correctly strips leading 0 and prepends country code (e.g., '+33612345678')
Form validation happens client-side before API call for immediate feedback
Backend POST /api/fleet/drivers correctly constructs payload with canWatchAuctions=true
Error handling properly extracts error messages from C# API responses
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
PhoneInput component has darkMode=false for fleet portal (light theme)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet portal add driver feature fully tested. All data proxies to C# API at api.zont.cab. Phone format expected: +XXXXXXXXXXXX (country code + number without leading 0). DO NOT actually create test drivers as they will persist in C# production system. React hydration warnings are from Emergent preview wrapper injecting spans - cosmetic only.

mocked_api.note: All Fleet APIs proxy to real C# backend at https://api.zont.cab - no mocked data
